mission.title: dify: [☂️] Dify Trigger — Event-driven Workflow Foundation
mission.description: [☂️] Dify Trigger — Event-driven Workflow Foundation. Requested by 17+ users.

steps.title: Check current dify deployment
steps.description:
Verify your dify version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify
helm list -n dify 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working dify installation.

steps.title: Review dify configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant dify configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify
kubectl get configmap -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dify
```
Trigger = **When something → then do something**

This is the foundation for event-driven Workflow capabilities, covering the following types:

* **Schedule** (time-based triggers)
* **SaaS Integration Event** (events from external SaaS platforms

steps.title: Apply the fix for [☂️] Dify Trigger — Event-driven Workflow Foundation
steps.description:
This PR implements the frontend foundation for the Dify Trigger system, providing a complete framework for trigger-based workflows.
```yaml
[☂️] Dify Trigger —
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify
kubectl get events -n dify --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[☂️] Dify Trigger — Event-driven Workflow Foundation" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: This PR implements the frontend foundation for the Dify Trigger system, providing a complete framework for trigger-based workflows.
codeSnippets:
### Frontend Readiness Status

Frontend UI and data processing logic completed, following existing node patterns. Complete data structure defined and ready for backend development reference.

**Related Issues:** Addresses #24001
Trigger introduction docs completed, https://www.notion.so/Trigger-tech-design-README-2550ad0f26b980359ad3e6b4d8e21f7e , after a talk offline, we'd like to cooperate under the notion workspace.
PR #24358 created for #23995 
Workflow Async Entry completed, already merged to feat/trigger, 
### How to test
Please ensure you've launched worker through .vscode/launch.json.example

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with dify installed or the issue environment reproducible.
